name: Young-donor plasma exchange MCI pilot preprint
summary: Pilot safety and feasibility study using plasma dilution and young-donor plasma replacement in 12 patients with mild cognitive impairment and Alzheimer disease biomarker evidence.
population: Patients with mild cognitive impairment and biomarker evidence of Alzheimer disease

trial_details.horizon_note: A preprint reports pilot safety and feasibility results; ClinicalTrials.gov still listed unknown status and no registry-posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This source directly tests young-donor plasma exchange in a disease-adjacent aging-relevant population, but preprint and uncontrolled design constraints prevent any efficacy upgrade.
